query: SELECT id, registrationId, passengerName, outboundAirline, outboundFlightNo, outboundDepartureCode, outboundArrivalCode, outboundDepartureDate FROM flight_tickets WHERE registrationId BETWEEN 570001 AND 570023 LIMIT 5;
